name: Bridget
text: Onboarding step sentences don't make sense — make sure paragraphs can be cut down; they don't read well as a whole. Remove the 'what's look like'. Bold 'Answer honestly'. (Priority: High · Needs testing) Screenshot: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1E2BTpjJLXlnnBbvgmtRO8AYFDAgOQqeg/view?usp=drive_link

name: Brian
text: Make sure game answers are relevant to HCP. For example, in Family Feud the top answer for hallucinations on a pricing quote is 'incorrect SKUs' — we don't have SKUs here. (Priority: Med)

name: Brian
text: My Manager tab: going there should auto-load who's on your team based on your role. (Priority: Med)

name: Skylar
text: Mobile integration with Okta + App. (Priority: Low)

name: Skylar
text: Current streak — lots of negative space in the box. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Is it actively regenerating updated materials? How can we tell? (Priority: High · In progress)

name: Skylar
text: Discover, Games — all the small titles (like the discovery page heading) are still on the left and look weird/small. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Discovery and Chat — the boxes should be/look the same. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: For lessons, when it pops up it should also show the outline — like the chat examples that pop up and give the outline. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Timer bar for loading lessons / today's picks / anything that needs to be generated. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Hovers in Achievements should match Discovery. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Brian's XP shows as 25 (only the welcome bonus) on his end but shows 115 points on my end. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: XP bar on top of the menu. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Quick tip — a small, simple, quick gut-check at the end. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Heatmap freshness should track how recently you studied each skill — and when there's a new LLM update / model advancement that changes how things are prompted, mark those skills stale. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: In lessons, use a specific model for the task; if asked, explain why to use that model and how to change models. (Priority: High · In progress)

name: Skylar
text: The app should recognize when someone isn't up to date on a model in the heatmap — maybe we need models baked in more. (Priority: High · In progress)

name: Skylar
text: When something is stale, it should call out the prompting and explain why you're stale — e.g. there have been new releases, here's why you need to make these changes. (Priority: High · In progress)

name: Skylar
text: Getting non-Okta users into the app. (Priority: High)

name: Skylar
text: Do I need to whitelist the app? (Priority: High)
